title: Crafting on a Stick
description: Adds multiple crafting station on a stick such as crafting table on a stick
body:
## Crafting on a stick let's you craft items without the need to place a crafting table on the ground. ### This mod adds multiple workbenches on a stick: - Crafting Table - Anvil - Loom - Grindstone - Cartography Table - Stonecutter - Smithing Table **You can use these items in hand to access the workbenches.**
  ### Crafting use a stick and the workbench like these examples:
![How to craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tg5fXO1x/images/c7b5e159061bf08b7f7bf8d8b9db6f097716520d.png)
### Compatible with curios Put your favorite workbench on a stick in the designated curios slot and press the keybind to open it *(default V)* ### I am looking for translations if you wish to help, check the [github page](https://github.com/OfekN-mods/crafting-on-a-stick?tab=readme-ov-file#translations) or join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/tTVaJ7wXV9).
